segments.text: Continuing to pressure the shield with dair
segments.original_text: 空中下でさらにシールドに圧をかける

segments.text: But with Samus' weight, an up smash would catch that
segments.original_text: だがここは上スマで拾うサムスの体重なら

segments.text: The space at the top of Battlefield should be safe enough
segments.original_text: 戦場の上の広さなら大丈夫

segments.text: PK Thunder gets shut down cleanly by the dair
segments.original_text: PKサンダーは空中下でしっかりと打ち消して

segments.text: Fire gets caught on it, awkward!
segments.original_text: ファイヤー引っかかって気まずい

segments.text: Awkward situation, and then the up smash!
segments.original_text: 気まずいそして上スマ

full_text: Continuing to pressure the shield with dair But with Samus' weight, an up smash would catch that The space at the top of Battlefield should be safe enough PK Thunder gets shut down cleanly by the dair Fire gets caught on it, awkward! Awkward situation, and then the up smash!

corrections.original: だがここは上相撲で拾うサムスの体重なら
corrections.corrected: だがここは上スマで拾うサムスの体重なら

corrections.original: 気まずいそして上相撲
corrections.corrected: 気まずいそして上スマ
